overall.description: A smooth, continuous forward movement across a wide sandy beach toward a prominent sea stack rock formation (resembling Haystack Rock), with forested coastline to the right and ocean to the left. The footage is clearly from a high-fidelity game engine such as Microsoft Flight Simulator, featuring photorealistic environmental rendering, volumetric clouds, and subtle UI indicators at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with tidal sand flats

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward across the sandy beach toward the large rock formation, maintaining a straight path

entered.detail: tall monolithic sea stack rock formation rising from the ocean near the shoreline
dense evergreen coniferous trees covering the coastal dunes and hillside
calm blue sea water extending to the horizon with gentle waves
low-lying coastal mountains and cliffs visible in the background beyond the rock

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady forward trajectory across an empty sandy beach toward Haystack Rock, a prominent sea stack formation visible in the distance. The beach is flanked by dense coastal forest on the right and calm ocean waters on the left, with volumetric clouds drifting across the bright blue sky. The scene remains consistent throughout, with no other characters or vehicles present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward trajectory across a vast sandy beach that gradually brings a distant sea stack into clear focus. It begins with a wide view of the empty shoreline, moving parallel to the calm ocean waters on the left and a dense coastal forest on the right. As the camera advances, the scale of the environment shifts, making the prominent Haystack Rock formation grow larger and more imposing against the horizon. The scene continues its smooth approach under a bright blue sky with drifting volumetric clouds, finally closing the distance toward the towering rock structure.
